vault.description: Sensitive data is encrypted on your device. Only you have access to your profile.

preview.title: Live preview
preview.description: See which fields are being filled in real time — before you download the PDF.

featuresSection.title: Less typing, done faster
featuresSection.subtitle: Formfill is built for recurring government forms — with a focus on privacy and accuracy.

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.subtitle: Short and sweet — everything you need to know about Formfill.

pdfTypes.question: Which PDF forms work?
pdfTypes.answer: Formfill works with PDFs that contain fillable form fields (AcroForms). Scanned documents without interactive fields are not supported yet.

dataStorage.question: Is my data stored?
dataStorage.answer: Your profile is encrypted on your device and stored in your vault. Uploaded PDFs are only used for processing and are not permanently stored on our servers.

pricing.question: Does Formfill cost anything?
pricing.answer: You can try Formfill for free — preview is always free. With an account, you get 2 free downloads per month. Additional downloads or a Pro subscription with unlimited downloads are optional.

account.question: Do I need an account?
account.answer: No. You can start as a guest and fill out a form right away. With an account, you save your profile and keep track of your applications.

protection.question: How is my data protected?
protection.answer: Sensitive profile data is encrypted on your device before it's stored. Only you have access to your vault.

aiPrivacy.question: Does the AI see my personal details?
aiPrivacy.answer: No. The AI only analyzes form text and field names to map fields — not your filled-in profile data.

cta.title: Ready for your next application?
cta.subtitle: Start as a guest or create an account to save your profile and manage applications.

footer.tagline: Smart PDF form filling — made in Germany.
footer.privacyText: Your profile is encrypted on your device. PDFs are only processed, not permanently stored.
